subcodes.first_line: O Dhabih! The verses have indeed descended from the heaven of thy Lord's Will, the Lord of Names and Attributes, when thou didst attain His presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ذبیح قد نزلت الایات من سماء مشیه ربک مالک الاسماء و الصفات اذا حضر لدی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @prophecy and fulfillment
